intro: Amblygonum senegalense, also known as African gentian, is a plant species native to West Africa, characterized by its yellowish-green flowers and numerous medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
